MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor/Trustee and the Attorney to appear on February 13, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why they have not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes. The Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration etc. is also continued to that date.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Cabasares. Not reported.
